input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.5.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.5.4
            TITLE: glv systems other than the airs ev.5.4, parts of the precharge and discharge circuits ev.5.6,

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.5.4: GLV Systems other than the AIRs EV.5.4, parts of the Precharge and Discharge Circuits EV.5.6,
EV.6.5.4 GLV Systems other than the AIRs EV.5.4, parts of the Precharge and Discharge Circuits EV.5.6, 
HV DC/DC converters, the AMS EV.7.3, the IMD EV.7.6, parts of the TSAL EV.5.9.1 the Energy 
Meter EV.3.1 and cooling fans must not be inside the Accumulator Container.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 99 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: GLV Systems other than the AIRs EV.5.4, parts of the Precharge and Discharge Circuits EV.5.6, HV DC/DC converters, the AMS EV.7.3, the IMD EV.7.6, parts of the TSAL EV.5.9.1 the Energy Meter EV.3.1 and cooling fans must not be inside the Accumulator Container.
